title: Tea House Cinematic Demo
original_prompt: Night Chinese traditional tea house, warm golden light, slow push-in camera, people sitting around a carved tea table, cinematic realistic style.

shots.visual_prompt: Exterior lantern and carved wooden entrance

shots.visual_prompt: Warm interior with tea steam and wood screen
shots.action_prompt: characters sit calmly around the tea table

shots.visual_prompt: Close-up of tea cup, fruit and warm reflections
